articles.title: „Najbardziej luksusowy hotel w Polsce”. Znany polski miliarder wskrzesza perłę w górach
articles.summary: "To będzie najbardziej luksusowy hotel w Polsce" - zapowiedział Józef Wojciechowski, założyciel J.W. Construction. "Imperial" w Zakopanem lata świetności ma za sobą, ale już nieb

articles.title: Ceny paliw w środę. Będzie zmiana na stacjach
articles.summary: Maksymalna cena dla benzyny Pb95 wynosi 6,52 zł za litr, dla benzyny Pb98 – 7,07 zł, a dla oleju napędowego – 7 zł, jak wynika z obwieszczenia ministra energii. Ceny te będą obowiązywać na stacjach paliw 20 maja.

articles.title: Miasto dopłaci do zbierania deszczówki. Dotacja do 2,5 tys. zł
articles.summary: W poniedziałek w Kielcach rozpoczął się nabór wniosków o dotacje na zatrzymywanie deszczówki i ochronę zasobów wodnych. O wsparcie mogą starać się osoby prywatne, które mają nieruchomości na terenie miasta. Program obejmuje m.in. zbiorniki na wodę opadową, studnie chłonne

articles.title: Startup backed by American Eagle CEO reaches unicorn status in latest funding round
articles.summary: Radar, a hardware and software company that helps retailers better manage inventory and cut back on theft, is now valued at over $1 billion.

articles.title: CDC says there are no U.S. hantavirus cases currently, 41 people being monitored
articles.summary: The CDC said the risk to the general public from hantavirus remains low.

articles.title: These three artworks could sell for $100 million each next week as May auctions begin
articles.summary: The wild card for the May auctions is the Middle East, with the Iran war clouding buyer expectations.

articles.title: Hantavirus outbreak isn't another Covid pandemic – but experts say it's testing U.S. readiness
articles.summary: For some experts, the outbreak is raising broader concerns about how equipped the U.S. is to respond to future infectious disease threats.

articles.title: Biogen advances Alzheimer's drug to late-stage trial despite disappointing data
articles.summary: Biogen said signals suggest the treatment decreases levels of tau and slows cognitive decline, particularly at the lowest dose.

articles.title: CDC says American tests positive for Ebola in Africa, risk in the U.S. remains low
articles.summary: No cases tied to the Ebola outbreak have been confirmed in the U.S., and the overall risk to the American public and travelers remains low.

articles.title: Lululemon takes battle with Chip Wilson public, calls founder 'misguided' and 'outdated'
articles.summary: Lululemon responded publicly to founder Chip Wilson's campaign in a letter to shareholders, where it urged them to vote in its favor at its annual meeting.

articles.title: Homebuilder sentiment improves on late spring surge in demand
articles.summary: Builders are feeling slightly better about the housing market, as they see improved buyer traffic in a potential late spring surge.

articles.title: Creator content made the main stage at TV's 'upfront' pitches — and not just for YouTube
articles.summary: In media companies' annual pitch to advertisers this week, creator content played a bigger role as a new category for reaching younger audiences.

articles.title: Meet the pilots flying Spirit Airlines' yellow jets to the desert
articles.summary: Special pilots have been moving Spirit's fleet of yellow jets to the desert.

articles.title: Chinese EVs are coming to Canada, and some dealers can't wait to sell them
articles.summary: Canada is allowing 49,000 Chinese-made electric vehicles to be imported for retail sales annually at a tariff rate of 6.1%.

articles.title: Family investors turn to old-economy businesses like dealerships and fisheries to avoid AI disruption
articles.summary: While car dealerships and fisheries are less eye-catching than high-flying AI startups, they offer stability and cash flow that's attractive to family offices.

articles.title: Starbucks to lay off 300 U.S. employees, shutter some regional support offices
articles.summary: Starbucks said the moves will help the coffee chain return to profitable growth.

articles.title: Detroit automakers have cut more than 20,000 U.S. salaried jobs as AI threat looms
articles.summary: Reasons for the job declines vary by automaker, but are generally tied to evolving technological changes in the industry — including the rise of AI.

articles.title: China will order 200 Boeing jets, Trump tells Fox News
articles.summary: President Donald Trump told Fox News that China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, according to a clip that aired Thursday.
